Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 "C:\\Users\\11\\anaconda3\\envs\\vcai\\python.exe" -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)

from backend.database import SessionLocal
from persona.agent import get_persona

db = SessionLocal\(\)
try:
    for pid in ['friendly_customer', 'difficult_customer', 'detail_oriented_customer']:
        p = get_persona\(pid, db\)
        print\(f'--- {p[\\"id\\"]} ---'\)
        print\(f'name:       {p[\\"name\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'difficulty: {p[\\"difficulty\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'emotion:    {p[\\"default_emotion\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'traits:     {p[\\"traits\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'prompt len: {len\(p[\\"personality_prompt\\"]\)} chars'\)
        print\(f'prompt[:80]: {p[\\"personality_prompt\\"][:80]}'\)
        print\(\)
finally:
    db.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 "C:\\Users\\11\\anaconda3\\envs\\vcai\\python.exe" -c "
import ast
with open\('tts/agent.py', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    src = f.read\(\)
ast.parse\(src\)
print\('Syntax OK'\)

checks = [
    \('fallback phrases list', '_FALLBACK_PHRASES = ['\),
    \('voice-not-found warning', 'Voice file not found for voice_id'\),
    \('synthesis-failed warning', 'Synthesis failed, returning fallback phrase'\),
    \('total-failure silence', 'Total failure, returning silence'\),
]
for name, needle in checks:
    print\(f'  {\\"OK\\" if needle in src else \\"MISSING\\"}: {name}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash("C:\\Users\\11\\anaconda3\\envs\\vcai\\python.exe" -c "
import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from rag.agent import fact_check_transcript
import json

t = [
    {'speaker': 'customer', 'text': 'انا بدور على شقة في مدينتي', 'turn_number': 1},
    {'speaker': 'salesperson', 'text': 'تفضلي، مدينتي عندنا شقق بسعر مليون ونص', 'turn_number': 2},
    {'speaker': 'customer', 'text': 'والمقدم بكام؟', 'turn_number': 3},
    {'speaker': 'salesperson', 'text': 'مقدم مدينتي 30% وتقسيط على 7 سنوات', 'turn_number': 4},
    {'speaker': 'customer', 'text': 'حلو، هفكر', 'turn_number': 5},
]

result = fact_check_transcript\(t\)
print\('claims_checked:', result['claims_checked']\)
print\('errors:', len\(result['errors']\)\)
for e in result['errors']:
    print\(' -', e['claim_type'], '|', e['severity'], '| claimed:', e['claimed_value'], '| correct:', e['correct_value']\)
print\('unverifiable:', len\(result['unverifiable_claims']\)\)
" 2>&1)
